requirement.original: 解决全部问题。删除截图和临时文件，ignore不需要备份/公开的文件
requirement.clarified: Fix .gitignore coverage and remove tracked transient files (screenshots, workflow state, node_modules, secrets, empty sentinel files) across 10 private repositories. Add .gitignore patterns to prevent re-introduction.
requirement.what: Multi-repo .gitignore cleanup and tracked file removal
requirement.why: Transient artifacts (workflow UUIDs, screenshots, node_modules, private knowledge data) have been committed to git indexes, causing noisy status and potential accidental exposure in future pushes

included: .gitignore pattern additions for workflow-*.json, .codex, .playwright-mcp/, screenshots, .env, private dirs
git rm --cached for all tracked transient files
Physical deletion of screenshot PNG/JPG files and .bak backup files
Unstaging of accidentally staged private data in knowledge-system
excluded: Deleting node_modules/ or private knowledge data from disk (untrack only)

success_criteria: git ls-files in each repo returns no transient files (workflow UUIDs, .codex, .playwright-mcp, node_modules, screenshots, .bak)
git check-ignore passes for all newly-added .gitignore patterns
knowledge-system private data (chats/, learning-materials/, knowledge-base/) not in git index
Screenshot/temp files deleted from disk where applicable
constraints: Use git rm --cached (not git rm) to untrack without deleting, except for files explicitly marked for deletion
Do not commit knowledge-system staged files until .gitignore is fixed
Do not add dist/ to rednote-mcp .gitignore
Do not touch data/decisions/ in budget-management

clarification_questions.question: Should docs/ be added to .gitignore entirely (all 383 files untracked, including docs/reference/, docs/archive/, docs/incidents*, docs/server-infra.md), or only docs/dev/ (200 dev-cycle artifacts untracked, keeping docs/reference/ and other reference docs tracked)?
clarification_questions.evidence: 183 non-dev docs tracked: docs/reference/checkpoint-mechanism.md, docs/archive/editor-configs, docs/clean/, docs/incidents-*, docs/server-infra.md, docs/ramdisk-architecture.md. These appear to be intentional reference documentation, not transient artifacts.

clarification_questions.question: Both bun.lock and package-lock.json are tracked. root package.json and app package.json both declare packageManager: yarn. Should both lockfiles be deleted+gitignored (yarn projects use yarn.lock, not bun.lock or package-lock.json), or keep package-lock.json and only gitignore bun.lock?
clarification_questions.evidence: root/happy/package.json: packageManager: yarn@1.22.22. No bun.config or bunfig.toml found. bun.lock is 559KB (Mar 15), package-lock.json is 1.2MB (Mar 26).

clarification_questions.question: INDEX.md (root) and scripts/INDEX.md are untracked. They match the auto-generated format used by dot-claude's INDEX.md files (Last updated timestamp, Total entries, Convention: kebab, tree structure). Are these intentional documentation to track, or auto-generated artifacts to add to .gitignore?
clarification_questions.evidence:
Content: '# rednote-mcp
*Last updated: 2026-05-04T09:02:56Z*
**Total entries**: 16
**Convention**: kebab
## Tree'. Identical format to dot-claude/docs/dev/INDEX.md which is an auto-generated file.

clarification_questions.question: The null/ directory (3 tracked files: index.html + 2 PDFs) appears to be a bug where a null company name created a literal 'null' directory. Duplicate files exist in data/cover_letters/ and data/resumes/. Should null/ be deleted entirely? Also: 4 root files with no extension (education_details, experience_details, projects, skills) are tracked — duplicates exist in data/. Should these root copies be deleted?
clarification_questions.evidence: null/hunterbond-kdb-developer/ contains PDFs that exactly duplicate /root/application-assistant/data/cover_letters/Yuge_Tang_cover_letter_hunterbond-kdb-developer_20260405.pdf and /root/application-assistant/data/resumes/Yuge_Tang_resume_hunterbond-kdb-developer_20260405.pdf

in_user_path: git index of each repo (via git rm --cached)
out_of_path_observed_but_not_touched: knowledge-system .review/schedule.json and chats/index.json - noted as mixed state but primary cleanup is knowledge-system-jade
travel-planner data/ .bak files in subdirectories not matched by current pattern

root_cause_analysis.symptom: Transient files (workflow UUIDs, screenshots, node_modules, private knowledge data, .env, .codex sentinels) tracked in git across multiple repos
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: Two distinct causes: (1) .gitignore patterns incomplete at time of initial commit — files landed in git before exclusion rules existed; (2) .gitignore patterns insufficient (workflow-current.json instead of workflow-*.json, .codex/ dir vs .codex file, data/*/*.bak vs *.bak)
root_cause_analysis.root_cause_commit: N/A — multiple historical commits across repos
root_cause_analysis.why_introduced: Repos grew organically; .gitignore rules were added after initial commits, leaving previously-tracked files stuck in the index
root_cause_analysis.why_problematic: git rm --cached is required to untrack files already in the index even when .gitignore is updated; this step was not done when .gitignore rules were added
affected_files: ~1800+ files to be removed from git index
observations: git ls-files confirms .last-cleanup, .todos.json, playwright-storage-state.json tracked in dot-claude (observed)
git ls-files confirms 525 node_modules/ files tracked in knowledge-system (observed)
git ls-files confirms 41 chats/, 64 learning-materials/, 173 knowledge-base/ files tracked in knowledge-system despite .gitignore exclusions (observed)
git ls-files confirms 11 workflow UUID files tracked in multi-asset-portfolio (observed)
git ls-files confirms .codex empty file tracked in orchestra (observed)
ls confirms 135 PNG + 1 JPG at budget-management root (observed)
git ls-files confirms .env tracked in travel-planner (observed)
git ls-files confirms bun.lock + package-lock.json tracked in happy (observed)
rednote-mcp git status shows .codex, .claude/, stderr_preinstall_*.txt as untracked but not gitignored (observed)
excel-analyzer .claude/settings.local.json exists on disk, not tracked, not gitignored (observed)
knowledge-system-jade git ls-files confirms .review/schedule.json + chats/index.json tracked (observed)
root_cause_analysis.localization_evidence: git ls-files and .gitignore file reads in all 12 repos confirmed exact tracked files and missing patterns

requirements_decomposition.acceptance_criterion: git ls-files in each repo returns no transient files
Screenshot PNGs/JPGs and .bak files deleted from disk; untracked from git

requirements_decomposition.source_phrase: ignore不需要备份/公开的文件
requirements_decomposition.acceptance_criterion: .gitignore patterns added for all identified file classes; git check-ignore confirms each

dot-claude.notes: docs/dev/ untrack unconditionally (200 dev-cycle artifacts). Full docs/ pending Q1.

knowledge-system.git_reset_first: git reset HEAD to unstage accidentally staged private files before applying gitignore fix
knowledge-system.notes: Do NOT delete node_modules/ or private data from disk. Reset staging area first.

multi-asset-portfolio.notes: The .playwright-mcp/ dir has logs that are NOT tracked — only the PNG was tracked. git rm --cached only needed for the PNG.

orchestra.gitignore_note: Existing .codex/ entry covers a directory; .codex (file) also needs bare entry

delete_physical: *.bak files (32 tracked, backups of live data files that exist without .bak)
travel-planner.notes: Live data files (attractions.json etc.) exist without .bak — .bak copies are safe to delete

rednote-mcp.notes: No files currently tracked that need git rm --cached; all items are currently untracked (??)

excel-analyzer.notes: File exists on disk but is not currently tracked. .gitignore addition prevents future tracking.

knowledge-system-jade.notes: Patterns already in .gitignore. Files were committed before rules existed.

application-assistant.blocked: Pending Q4 for null/ directory and root extension-less files disposition
application-assistant.notes: null/ is a bug artifact (literal 'null' directory name). Duplicates confirmed in data/.

setup.reason: non-UI -- config; cycle does not produce (1) rendered UI changes, (2) browser interaction, (3) Playwright invocation, (4) screenshot evidence, or (5) any change to user-triggered code paths

evidence.observed: 解决全部问题。删除截图和临时文件，ignore不需要备份/公开的文件

measured.value: ~1800+ files tracked in git across 12 repos that should not be tracked; 10 .gitignore files missing required patterns
measured.location: git ls-files output per repo, verified in this session

expected.value: Only intentional source files tracked; transient artifacts excluded by .gitignore
expected.source: Standard git hygiene practices; .gitignore comments in repos explicitly marking files as should-not-sync

evidence.gap: git index contains workflow UUIDs (100+), node_modules (525), private knowledge data (278), screenshots (200+), .bak files (32+), .env, .codex sentinels, .playwright-mcp contents

all_occurrences: see per_repo_actions above for per-repo file lists

reference_source.description: Live git ls-files and .gitignore file reads in this session
reference_source.url_or_location: Each repo root .gitignore and git index

pre_existing_guards.code_snippet: # Note: dist/ is intentional — do NOT add to .gitignore
pre_existing_guards.purpose: Prevent accidental removal of intentional build output tracking
Force-track template and taxonomy files even within otherwise-excluded directories

context.codebase_state: Multiple repos with modified .gitignore and tracked transient files
context.recent_commits: e78ce03 auto-bulk: end-of-cycle commit for master

development_approach.strategy: Per-repo sequential execution: (1) fix .gitignore patterns, (2) git rm --cached tracked transient files, (3) delete physical temp files, (4) commit. Handle knowledge-system staging area reset before fix.
development_approach.validation_approach: git ls-files in each repo after cleanup; git check-ignore for new patterns; ls at repo roots for deleted screenshot files
